```typescript
type CycleStatus = 
  | 'pending'
  | 'agent_a_running'
  | 'agent_b_running'
  | 'committing'
  | 'committed'
  | 'completed'
  | 'failed'
  | 'skipped';
```

```typescript
  | 'idle'
  | 'running'

  | 'rate_limited'
  | 'completed'
  | 'schedule_timeout'
  | 'failed'
  | 'aborted';
```
